statement.en: Lean 4 progress: Conditional Probability — 13 theorems/lemmas, 0 sorry, 0 axiom
statement.ja: Lean 4 進捗: Conditional Probability — 定理 13 / sorry 0 / axiom 0
statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1009 (β) — Layer 4 拡張: Conditional Probability + PMF
  藤本伸樹 + Claude Opus 4.7 — 2026-04-28

  Demonstrates Mathlib v4.27 ConditionalProbability + ProbabilityMassFunction
  primitives in the Rei-AIOS project.

  Topics:
    §1. Discrete conditional probability P(A|B) on Fin n
    §2. Bayes' theorem (statement + concrete instance)
    §3. Conditional independence
    §4. Two-card draw — probability of full house

  All theorems machine-checked, zero sorry / zero axiom.

  Honest note: Mathlib's ConditionalProbability module uses MeasureTheory
  Measure-style cond. For pedagogical clarity we

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
